APPEARANCES:
Jacob Burland, Esq., 781-7999, for defendant San Francisco Housing Authority, moving for summary judgment
No appearance by plaintiff. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT San Francisco HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- granted for failure to comply with Government Code 945.5 and 950.2, no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR 7855

Off Calendar Jul-17-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff DOMICIANA DIOQUINO in propria persona and opposing party
* Ms. Dioquino presented papers for the Court's review. The matter was passed and recalled after the Court had time to review said documents. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- defendant ALEXANDER ZEVELYOV's motion for summary judgment is granted.
(JJM) Reporter: Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
